'''Balahteez''' was a [[Pho Ph'eahian]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and transported to [[Despayre]]. Balahteez developed numerous information contacts over the years, many of whom ended up on Despayre with him. He lived in [[Slashtown]] Prison Colony.

==Biography==
While being pursued by an Imperial patrol near [[Gall/Legends|Gall]], Balahteez jettisoned his illegal cargo, which was packed inside a block of [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] the size of a luggage trunk. The carbonite had been pulled down into Gall's gravity well and accidentally hit a barracks housing a large unit of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] mechanics. The impact punched a hole into the outer hull large enough to form a crater thirty meters wide in diameter, killing fifty mechanics immediately, and another thirty who were sucked out into hard [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] during the explosive decompression. The hole was so large that another twelve mechanics who survived the initial blast and the decompression died from a lack of air before emergency droids could seal the barracks.

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}}
